finding: Cause: bacteremia (most commonly S. aureus) with nonsterile IV administration

differentials.name: Aortic dissection Cause:   systemic hypertension + positive inotropic + chronotropic cardiac effects of cocaine
differentials.raw: Aortic dissection Cause:   systemic hypertension + positive inotropic + chronotropic cardiac effects of cocaine

differentials.name: Arterial occlusion (a)  at injection site ← intimal damage, thrombosis, spasm (b)  distal to injection site ← embolization, spasm
differentials.raw: Arterial occlusion (a)  at injection site ← intimal damage, thrombosis, spasm (b)  distal to injection site ← embolization, spasm

differentials.name: Embolization of infectious agent / foreign body / air through inadvertent arterial injection
differentials.raw: Embolization of infectious agent / foreign body / air through inadvertent arterial injection ("hit the pink")

differentials.name: Deep vein thrombosis (DVT) (after superficial veins have been exhausted) "groin hit" into femoral vein; "pocket shot" into jugular, subclavian vein, brachiocephalic vein
differentials.raw: Deep vein thrombosis (DVT) (after superficial veins have been exhausted) "groin hit" into femoral vein; "pocket shot" into jugular, subclavian vein, brachiocephalic vein

differentials.name: Intravenous migration of needle to heart / lungs
differentials.raw: Intravenous migration of needle to heart / lungs
